property.name: returnUrl
property.label: Return URL
property.description: The url to be redirected back to

property.name: searchFeeCode
property.label: Fee Code
property.description: The fee code to search for

property.name: getAllFees
property.label: Get All Fees?
property.description: Specify true if all fees are taken or false if only those specified by Fee Code

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: The label to appear on the button

property.name: nextButton
property.label: Next Button
property.description: If the next button should be displayed for omniscript

property.name: nextButtonLabel
property.label: Next Button Label
property.description: The label to appear on the next button
